understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' on each level (including BP35) without landing on spike tiles, using at most 2 attempts per level and 50 turns per attempt, then continue level-to-level until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or a CLICK (optionally UNDO). After any horizontal move, the character slides/falls automatically in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid/support tile (e.g., o/m/w), reaches the goal '+', or hits a hazard. Landing on spikes (u/v) ends the attempt immediately. CLICK interacts with clickable tiles (notably removing breakable 'x' blocks to open a fall path) and does not consume platform-timer moves when a moving platform is present. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a bad move or click.
